items.title_en: Mercedes-Benz commits to bringing back physical buttons
items.title_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰承诺重新回归物理按钮
items.summary_en: Mercedes-Benz plans to reintroduce physical knobs and tactile controls, signaling a shift away from touchscreen-dominated interiors toward familiar, tactile interaction. The move could influence UX standards in premium cars and inform future cabin design.
items.summary_zh: 梅赛德斯-奔驰计划重新引入物理旋钮和实体按钮，强调从以触控为主的内饰向更直觉、可触感交互回归。此举可能影响高端车的用户体验标准，并引导未来座舱设计。

items.title_en: For thirty years I programmed with Phish on, every day
items.title_zh: 三十年里我每天都和 Phish 一起编程
items.summary_en: A personal meditation on how Phish’s music shaped the author’s coding flow for decades, merging rhythm with problem solving. It offers a human side of software craft and how music can underpin productive workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者三十年来每天在编程时聆听 Phish，音乐与编码节奏彼此呼应，成为个人工作流的一部分。文章从人性的角度探讨了音乐对软件创作的影响。

items.title_en: How far behind is each major Chromium browser?
items.title_zh: 各大 Chromium 浏览器的落后程度到底有多远？
items.summary_en: A comparative look at how far behind each major Chromium-based browser is from upstream Chromium in features, performance, and update cadence.
items.summary_zh: 对比各大 Chromium 基础浏览器在功能、性能和更新节奏方面与上游 Chromium 的差距。揭示对网页兼容性和用户感知现代性可能造成的影响。

items.title_en: Southwest Headquarters Tour
items.title_zh: 西南航空总部参观
items.summary_en: A tour of Southwest's headquarters reveals how the airline supports large-scale operations and collaboration through campus tech and security initiatives. It offers practical takeaways for enterprise IT culture, resilient infrastructure, and design-minded corporate spaces.
items.summary_zh: 对西南航空总部的参观揭示了公司如何通过园区科技、安保与协作工具支撑大规模运营。为企业 IT 文化、韧性基础设施和设计导向的办公空间提供了可借鉴的经验。

items.title_en: Metal Gear Solid 2's source code has been leaked on 4chan
items.title_zh: 4chan 上 Metal Gear Solid 2 源代码泄露
items.summary_en: The leak reportedly exposes Metal Gear Solid 2's source code, fueling discussion about preservation, modding, and IP risk for classic games. It spotlights how legacy code can reappear and affect fan projects and legal considerations.
items.summary_zh: 据称泄露的是《合金装备 2》的源代码，引发关于游戏保留、模组开发以及版权风险的讨论。凸显了遗留代码可能再次曝光对粉丝项目和法律的影响。

items.title_en: The Oscars just banned AI from winning acting and writing awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡刚宣布禁止 AI 获得最佳表演与编剧奖项
items.summary_en: The Oscars block AI from winning acting and writing awards, reinforcing human-centered categories and prompting studios to rethink AI's role in production. It signals a turning point for how AI is treated in mainstream entertainment awards.
items.summary_zh: 奥斯卡宣布禁用 AI 参与最佳表演与最佳编剧等奖项，强调人类作品的优先地位，并促使业界重新评估 AI 在制作中的角色。

items.title_en: BYOMesh – New LoRa mesh radio offers 100x the bandwidth
items.title_zh: BYOMesh：新一代 LoRa 网状无线电带来 100 倍带宽
items.summary_en: BYOMesh launches a LoRa mesh radio claiming 100x the bandwidth of typical LoRa devices, enabling more data-rich IoT, firmware updates, and real-time telemetry over long ranges. The move highlights how higher-throughput needs are pushing mesh/LPWAN technology beyond traditional use cases.
items.summary_zh: BYOMesh 推出声称比常规 LoRa 设备快 100 倍带宽的网状无线电，可能支持更高数据量的物联网、固件更新和远程遥测等。此举反映了在大范围低功耗网络里，对更高吞吐的需求正在推动新应用场景的产生。

items.title_en: VS Code inserting 'Co-Authored-by Copilot' into commits regardless of usage
items.title_zh: VS Code 无论是否使用都在提交中插入“Co-Authored-by Copilot”标签
items.summary_en: A bug in the editor causes commits to automatically include a Co-Authored-by: Copilot trailer, even when Copilot wasn't used. The behavior fragments authorship signals in Git metadata and could misattribute work, prompting a patch in the works. This highlights the broader challenge of AI-assisted attribution within developer tooling.
items.summary_zh: 编辑器存在一个错误，会在提交中自动插入 Co-Authored-by: Copilot 标签，即使未使用 Copilot。该行为会导致 Git 元数据中的署名信息失真，促使相关修复被推进。这凸显了在开发工具中处理 AI 署名的广泛挑战。

items.title_en: A desktop made for one
items.title_zh: 为一个人定制的桌面
items.summary_en: A desktop built for a single user emphasizes bespoke configurations, streamlined workflows, and software choices tailored to one person's needs. The piece argues for systems optimized around individual requirements rather than generic, mass-market setups.
items.summary_zh: 描述为单一用户定制的桌面系统，强调定制化的配置、简化的工作流和专属的软件选择。观点在于以个人需求为中心的系统比大众化设置更高效。

items.title_en: Porsche will contest Laguna Seca in historic colors of the Apple Computer livery
items.title_zh: 保时捷将在拉古纳塞卡以 Apple 电脑专属历史涂装参赛
items.summary_en: Porsche will race Laguna Seca in historic Apple Computer livery colors, reviving a retro branding moment on the track. The retro aesthetic underscores how branding and color stories influence fan engagement and media coverage in motorsport.
items.summary_zh: 保时捷将在拉古纳塞卡以苹果电脑专属历史涂装参赛，重现昔日品牌形象。此举展示了品牌色彩在赛车赛事中的传播力和对观众参与度、媒体关注的影响。

items.title_en: Breaking up with WordPress after two decades
items.title_zh: 二十年后与 WordPress 说再见
items.summary_en: After two decades with WordPress, the author breaks away, citing plugin bloat, maintenance burden, and a desire for a more modern stack. The piece outlines a migration strategy, covering content preservation, SEO implications, and choosing a new framework or static-site approach. It serves as a case study for long-running sites reconsidering their tech stack.
items.summary_zh: 在 WordPress 持续使用了二十年后，作者决定告别，原因包括插件臃肿、维护负担与希望采用更现代的技术栈。文章给出迁移策略，涵盖内容保留、SEO 影响以及选择新框架或静态站点方案。这为长期站点重新评估技术栈提供了一个案例研究。

items.title_en: Alert-driven monitoring
items.title_zh: 基于告警驱动的监控
items.summary_en: Alert-Driven Monitoring describes a monitoring approach where alerts guide the instrumentation and response workflows. It argues for designing actionable alerts with clear runbooks and automation to reduce noise and speed incident containment. The concept complements existing metrics dashboards by focusing on what actually requires action.
items.summary_zh: 告警驱动的监控将告警作为驱动，将监控的编排和响应流程引导。主张以可操作的告警、清晰的处置手册与自动化为设计核心，以减少噪声并提升事件处置速度。该理念与现有的指标仪表板互补，聚焦于真正需要采取行动的场景。

items.title_en: Kimi K2.6 just beat Claude, GPT-5.5, and Gemini in a coding challenge
items.title_zh: Kimi K2.6 在编码挑战中击败 Claude、GPT-5.5 与 Gemini
items.summary_en: Kimi K2.6, an open-weights Chinese model, beat Claude, GPT-5.5, and Gemini in a programming challenge. This underscores rapid progress in open-weight models and code-aware capabilities, showing non-proprietary models can compete with leading closed models on real tasks. It may heighten interest in open-source NLP tooling and benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: Kimi K2.6 在一次编码挑战中击败 Claude、GPT-5.5 与 Gemini，凸显开放权重模型在代码任务上的竞争力。此成就强调代码生成与理解领域的快速进步，以及对闭源大模型市场的潜在冲击。

items.title_en: Specsmaxxing – On overcoming AI psychosis, and why I write specs in YAML
items.title_zh: Specsmaxxing：克服 AI 的认知失衡，以及为何用 YAML 编写规格
items.summary_en: Specmaxxing argues that AI hype can be tempered by disciplined, machine-readable specs. It advocates using YAML to encode requirements, tests, and acceptance criteria to keep expectations realistic. The piece ties rigorous specification to clearer human–AI collaboration and governance.
items.summary_zh: Specsmaxxing 指出，通过严格、机器可读的规格可以抑制 AI 的过度炒作。主张用 YAML 将需求、测试和验收标准编码，以保持期望现实且便于沟通。将规范化写作视为改进人机协作和治理的关键手段。

items.title_en: Security Through Obscurity Is Not Bad
items.title_zh: 安全性并非来自暴露：隐藏策略也有价值
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that obscurity, used judiciously, can complement strong security practices rather than replace them. It discusses how limited visibility can reduce attack surfaces, protect IP, and buy time against adversaries.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张在恰当时机下的隐藏/保密可以与强安全措施互补，而不是取代它们。文中指出有限的可见性可降低攻击面、保护知识产权，并为防御赢得时间。

items.title_en: Largest electric autonomous container ship begins commercial service
items.title_zh: 全球最大的电动自动化集装箱船开始商用服务
items.summary_en: The first large-scale electric autonomous container ship has begun commercial service, marking a milestone in decarbonizing maritime freight and testing real-world autonomy at sea. The deployment may influence port operations, energy supply, and shipping regulations.
items.summary_zh: 全球最大的电动自动化集装箱船正式进入商业运营，标志着海运去碳化和海上自主化迈出关键一步。此举或影响港口运营、能源供给和海运监管格局。

items.title_en: Physical buttons outperform touchscreens in new cars (2023)
items.title_zh: 新车中物理按钮优于触摸屏（2023）
items.summary_en: A 2023 study finds physical controls outperform touchscreens in usability and safety in cars, prompting automakers to reconsider interface design. The result reinforces the enduring value of tactile interfaces in vehicles.
items.summary_zh: 2023 年的研究显示物理按钮在可用性和安全性方面优于触摸屏，促使车厂重新审视车载界面设计。这一结论强调了触觉界面的长期价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Apple's SHARP running in the browser via ONNX runtime web
items.title_zh: Show HN：Apple 的 Sharp 在浏览器中通过 ONNX Runtime Web 运行
items.summary_en: A Show HN post demonstrates Apple’s Sharp running in the browser via ONNX Runtime Web. It showcases how browser-based inference can be feasible for certain ML workloads without server round-trips.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示 Apple 的 Sharp 如何通过 ONNX Runtime Web 在浏览器中运行。演示了在浏览器端进行机器学习推理在无需服务器往返的情况下的可行性。讨论了在 JavaScript 环境中运行非原生模型时的可访问性与性能取舍。

items.title_en: A couple million lines of Haskell: Production engineering at Mercury
items.title_zh: Mercury 的生产工程：数百万行 Haskell 代码
items.summary_en: Mercury's production engineering team manages a codebase of several million lines of Haskell in production.
items.summary_zh: Mercury 的生产工程团队在生产环境中管理着数百万行 Haskell 代码，展示了如何将 Haskell 规模化。文中讨论了工具链、可靠性实践，以及强类型语言在实际系统中的应用。

items.title_en: This Month in Ladybird – April 2026
items.title_zh: Ladybird 本月要闻（2026 年 4 月）
items.summary_en: This April issue highlights progress, features, and milestones from the Ladybird project, reflecting active development and community contributions. It offers a compact view of what's new and what's next for the project.
items.summary_zh: 四月刊聚焦 Ladybird 项目的进展、新特性与里程碑，体现积极的开发与社区贡献，帮助读者把握最新动向。

items.title_en: Dav2d
items.title_zh: Dav2d：VideoLAN 的高性能 AV1 解码库
items.summary_en: Dav2d is an open-source, high-performance AV1 decoder from VideoLAN designed for speed and portability. It underscores ongoing efforts to improve decoding efficiency for modern codecs across media ecosystems and embedded devices.
items.summary_zh: Dav2d 是 VideoLAN 推出的开源高性能 AV1 解码库，强调在多平台/嵌入式设备上提升现代编解码效率。

items.title_en: Six years perfecting maps on watchOS
items.title_zh: 在 WatchOS 上打磨地图六年
items.summary_en: David Smith recounts six years of building maps for Apple Watch, detailing constraints like small screens, offline data, and battery life. The piece distills lessons on delivering usable geolocation features in wearables and what it takes to go from concept to a reliable user experience.
items.summary_zh: 作者回顾在 Apple Watch 上开发地图的六年历程，揭示屏幕小、离线数据与电池限制等挑战，以及在穿戴设备上落地可用地理定位功能所需的经验与教训。

items.title_en: Nuclear receptor 4A1 linked to health effects of coffee: study
items.title_zh: 咖啡与健康：NR4A1 与咖啡健康效应的关联研究
items.summary_en: A study links nuclear receptor NR4A1 to observed health effects from coffee consumption, suggesting molecular pathways that influence metabolism and inflammation. The finding helps explain why coffee impacts people differently and could guide personalized nutrition.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现核受体 NR4A1 与咖啡摄入的健康效应相关，提示可能影响代谢和炎症的分子通路。研究有助于解释个体对咖啡反应的差异，并为个性化营养提供线索。

items.title_en: NetHack 5.0.0
items.title_zh: NetHack 5.0.0 发布
items.summary_en: NetHack 5.0.0 marks a milestone release for the long-running roguelike, delivering extensive bug fixes, balance tweaks, and quality-of-life improvements. The update stabilizes gameplay across platforms while preserving the game's classic depth, offering newcomers a gentler entry point without sacrificing veteran strategy.
items.summary_zh: 这是对这款长期运行的roguelike的里程碑式更新，带来大量的错误修正、平衡调整和提升体验的改进。新版本在多平台上稳定玩法，同时保留了原有的深度，为新手和老玩家都提供更友善的入门体验。

items.title_en: Do_not_track
items.title_zh: Do_not_track：一个简化隐私保护的开源工具
items.summary_en: Do_not_track is a tool aiming to make opting out of tracking easier and more effective for users. It embodies a pragmatic approach to privacy in an era of pervasive data collection and could influence how individuals shield themselves online.
items.summary_zh: Do_not_track 是一个旨在简化用户隐私保护、便于拒绝跟踪的工具，体现了在广泛数据收集环境中对隐私的务实保护思路。

items.title_en: Investors pile into clean energy as Iran war drives push for energy security
items.title_zh: 在伊朗战争推动能源安全的背景下，投资者涌向清洁能源
items.summary_en: Investors are flocking to clean energy as geopolitical tensions push energy security higher on the agenda. The surge in funding spans renewables, storage, and grid resilience, with policy and market signals accelerating the transition. Geopolitics may expedite diversification away from fossil fuels and boost long-term climate and energy goals.
items.summary_zh: 在地缘政治紧张局势推动能源安全议程之际，投资者正涌向清洁能源。资金涌向可再生能源、储能与电网韧性建设，政策与市场信号正在加速能源转型。地缘政治因素可能加速对化石燃料的多元化依赖，推动长期气候与能源目标的实现。

items.title_en: Systemd-manager-TUI: A TUI application for managing systemd services
items.title_zh: Systemd-manager-TUI：用于管理 systemd 服务的文本用户界面
items.summary_en: Systemd-manager-TUI is a terminal UI for managing systemd services. It provides easy start/stop, enable/disable, status checks, and log viewing from a compact CLI interface. Designed as a lightweight alternative for headless or constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: Systemd-manager-TUI 是一个用于管理 systemd 服务的文本用户界面。它通过紧凑的 CLI 界面提供启停、启用/禁用、状态查看和日志查看等功能。面向无头或资源受限的环境，旨在成为一个轻量替代工具。

items.title_en: Maryland to ban A.I.-driven price increases in grocery stores
items.title_zh: 马里兰成为首个禁止 AI 驱动涨价的超市定价的州
items.summary_en: Maryland passes a first-in-the-nation ban on AI-driven price increases in grocery stores, aiming to curb personalized pricing powered by consumer data. The move raises policy questions about fairness, transparency, and consumer protection in data-driven pricing.
items.summary_zh: 马里兰州成为首个禁止超市使用 AI 驱动定价策略的州，意在限制基于消费者数据的个性化定价。此举引发关于公平性、透明度与消费者保护之间的讨论。

items.title_en: Why does it take so long to release black fan versions?
items.title_zh: 为什么推出黑色版风扇需要这么久？
items.summary_en: Manufacturing a black edition requires retooling lines, requalifying components, and coordinating color coatings with supply chains, QA, and certification work. That combination slows the release cadence even as base models ship.
items.summary_zh: 黑色版风扇的推出需要在制造线上进行重新布置、重新进行组件认证，并协调涂层、原料与供应链等环节，再加上严格的质量检测与认证流程。这些综合因素使得新版本的上市节奏明显慢于原厂标准款。

items.title_en: Neanderthals ran 'fat factories' 125k years ago (2025)
items.title_zh: 125,000 年前尼安德特人运营脂肪工厂
items.summary_en: New archaeological findings suggest Neanderthals ran large-scale fat-processing activities 125,000 years ago, hinting at sophisticated subsistence strategies and social organization. The discovery adds nuance to our understanding of Neanderthal cognition and energy management.
items.summary_zh: 新发现表明 125,000 年前的尼安德特人进行大规模脂肪加工，暴露出复杂的生计策略与社群组织能力，丰富了对其认知与能量管理的理解。

items.title_en: California to begin ticketing driverless cars that violate traffic laws
items.title_zh: 加州将对违反交通法规的无人驾驶汽车开罚单
items.summary_en: California plans to ticket autonomous cars that violate traffic laws through automated enforcement, pushing accountability onto AV operators. The move accelerates safety governance for on-road robo-taxis and tests how regulators handle software-driven infractions.
items.summary_zh: 加州计划对违反交通法规的无人驾驶汽车进行自动执法并开罚单，将问责落在运营方身上。此举加速了对路上机器人出租车的安全治理，并测试监管机构对软件性违规的处理方式。

items.title_en: A network smuggling Starlink tech into Iran to beat internet blackout
items.title_zh: 秘密网络通过走私 Starlink 设备进入伊朗以绕过互联网封锁
items.summary_en: A clandestine network smuggled Starlink hardware into Iran to bypass a government internet blackout. The move highlights how satellite-based connectivity can undermine censorship, raising questions about regulatory controls and information access. It also shows the ongoing tension between tech access and state control.
items.summary_zh: 一个秘密网络向伊朗走私 Starlink 设备，试图突破政府的互联网封锁。此举揭示卫星联网在规避审查方面的潜力，同时引发对监管、供应链及信息获取影响的讨论。

items.title_en: Open source does not imply open community
items.title_zh: 开源并不等同于开放社区
items.summary_en: The post argues that open-source projects can still have closed or gated communities, highlighting governance, contributor inclusion, and decision-making opacity. The takeaway: open source ≠ open governance; communities matter for sustainability.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出开源项目也可能存在封闭的或受限的社区治理现象，强调治理透明度、参与者包容性与决策过程的重要性。结论是开源并不等同于开放的治理体系，社区的结构影响长期可持续性。

items.title_en: Ghost Operators: How Israeli telecoms were exploited to track citizens worldwide
items.title_zh: 幽灵运营商：以色列电信公司如何被利用追踪全球公民
items.summary_en: An investigation into how certain telecom operators in the region were exploited to monitor individuals worldwide, raising concerns about surveillance, vendor dependencies, and regulatory gaps. The story underscores security risks in telecom ecosystems and data access across borders.
items.summary_zh: 调查揭示部分以色列及相关地区的电信运营商如何被用于全球范围内追踪个人，凸显监控、供应链信任和监管缺口等安全风险。报道强调了电信生态系统和跨国数据访问的潜在隐患。

items.title_en: I recreated the Apple Lisa computer inside an FPGA [video]
items.title_zh: 我在 FPGA 中重现 Apple Lisa 计算机
items.summary_en: A hands-on project recreates the Apple Lisa architecture on an FPGA, offering a tangible tour of its hardware quirks and OS interactions. It provides nostalgia plus a practical view into how legacy systems can be prototyped today.
items.summary_zh: 通过在 FPGA 上复现 Apple Lisa 的架构，展示了其硬件特点与与操作系统的交互。既有怀旧情怀，也展现了用现代现场可编程硬件原型化旧系统的可行性。

items.title_en: Utah to hold websites liable for users who mask their location with VPNs
items.title_zh: 犹他州拟对用 VPN 匿藏定位的用户的网站承担责任
items.summary_en: Utah is pursuing a law that would hold websites liable for users who mask their location via VPNs, effectively tying age-verification obligations to geo-circumvention. The measure could pressure sites to implement stricter verification but raises privacy and compliance cost concerns for smaller sites and privacy-preserving users. Its enforceability will depend on definitions of 'location masking' and how a site proves intent or compliance.
items.summary_zh: 犹他州正在推动一项法律，将对通过 VPN 匿名定位的用户进行访问的网站承担责任，实质上将地理位置规避与年龄验证义务绑定。该举措可能迫使网站实施更严格的身份验证，但也引发对隐私、合规成本以及对小型网站与注重隐私的用户的担忧。是否可执行取决于对“定位被遮蔽”的定义，以及网站如何证明合规与意图。

items.title_en: Roblox shares plummet 18% as child safety measures weigh on bookings
items.title_zh: Roblox 股价下跌 18%，儿童安全措施拖累订单
items.summary_en: Roblox's stock fell after earnings as safety-focused changes dampened bookings, signaling a tension between platform safety and monetization. The result underscores how child-safety measures and parental controls can materially impact growth in consumer-facing online services.
items.summary_zh: Roblox 在财报后股价下跌约 18%，因为以安全为导向的变动压缩了订单量。这凸显了平台安全与商业化之间的矛盾，儿童安全措施和家长控制对面向消费者的在线服务增长有实际影响。

items.title_en: Windows API is Successful Cross-Platform API (2024)
items.title_zh: Windows API 已成为成功的跨平台 API
items.summary_en: The Windows API has become a successful cross-platform API, reflecting how Windows interfaces and compatibility layers have become usable across different OSes. This trend affects how developers design cross-platform apps, reducing the need to rewrite for each platform and influencing porting strategies.
items.summary_zh: Windows API 已成为一个成功的跨平台接口，表明通过兼容层在不同操作系统上使用 Windows 接口已成为现实。此趋势正在影响开发者的跨平台设计与移植策略。

items.title_en: Underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time
items.title_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸对话
items.summary_en: An underwater robot tracks sperm whale conversations in real time, enabling researchers to analyze vocalization patterns and social interactions. The project advances marine bioacoustics and demonstrates sensor fusion in challenging environments.
items.summary_zh: 水下机器人实时记录抹香鲸的交流，帮助研究者分析声纳模式和社交互动。该项目推动海洋生物声学研究，并展示在极端环境下的传感器融合能力。

items.title_en: DeepSeek V4 – almost on the frontier
items.title_zh: DeepSeek V4：几近前沿
items.summary_en: DeepSeek V4 pushes closer to the frontier of data-search tooling, with improvements in indexing speed and user workflow. It frames how this version stacks up against peers and what the next leap in AI-assisted data discovery might look like.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 靠近数据检索工具的前沿，在索引速度和工作流方面有显著改进。它评估了该版本与同类产品的差异以及AI辅助数据发现的下一步可能走向。

items.title_en: The agent harness belongs outside the sandbox
items.title_zh: 代理 Harness 应该放在沙箱外运行
items.summary_en: The article argues that the agent harness belongs outside the sandbox to reduce the risk of sandbox escapes. It discusses architectural trade-offs and how separating trust boundaries can improve security and reliability for AI agents.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张为降低沙箱逃逸风险，应将代理 Harness 放在沙箱外运行，并分析将信任边界分离带来的安全与可靠性提升。

items.title_en: How many e's are in the word seventeen [video] (AI hallucination)
items.title_zh: 单词 seventeen 中有多少个 e？[视频]（AI 幻觉）
items.summary_en: A video illustrating an AI hallucination around a trivial typography question, showing how models can confidently err on simple prompts. It underscores verification and prompt design in AI systems.
items.summary_zh: 视频展示了 AI 在一个简单文本问题上的幻觉现象，体现模型在基础提示上的自信却可能出错。强调对 AI 输出进行核验和更好提示设计的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: State of the Art of Coding Models, According to Hacker News Commenters
items.title_zh: Show HN：据 Hacker News 评论者所评的编码模型现状
items.summary_en: This Show HN compiles Hacker News commenters' views to map the current state-of-the-art in coding models. It highlights which models are favored for code tasks, trade-offs between speed and accuracy, and community sentiment shaping practical tool choices.
items.summary_zh: 此 Show HN 汇总 Hacker News 评论者的观点，勾勒当前编码模型的现状，揭示在代码任务中的偏好模型、速度与准确度的权衡，以及社区对工具选择的影响。

items.title_en: Clojurists Together – Q2 2026 Open Source Funding Announcement
items.title_zh: Clojurists Together – 2026 年 Q2 开源资助公告
items.summary_en: Clojurists Together announces Q2 2026 open-source funding, detailing grants to several projects in the Clojure ecosystem. The funding signals continued community support for open-source Lisp ecosystems and could accelerate maintenance and feature development.
items.summary_zh: Clojurists Together 公布 2026 年 Q2 的开源资助计划，对若干 Clojure 生态项目给予资助。这反映社区对开源 Lisp 生态的持续支持，可能推动维护与新特性的开发。

items.title_en: How fast is a macOS VM, and how small could it be?
items.title_zh: macOS 虚拟机有多快，能有多小？
items.summary_en: The article benchmarks macOS VM performance on Apple hardware and explores how small a viable macOS VM can be. It discusses CPU, memory, and disk I/O tradeoffs and what they mean for dev/test workflows.
items.summary_zh: 文章测评了在苹果硬件上运行的 macOS 虚拟机性能，并探讨了可用的最小化体积与实际可用性之间的权衡。内容聚焦 CPU、内存和磁盘 I/O 的取舍，以及对开发/测试工作流的影响。

items.title_en: Open Design: Use Your Coding Agent as a Design Engine
items.title_zh: 开放式设计：把你的编码代理当成设计引擎
items.summary_en: Proposes using coding agents as design engines to automate design tasks, enabling code-driven workflows for UI prototyping. This approach demonstrates AI-assisted design at scale and the potential for tighter human-AI collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提出把编码代理用作设计引擎，自动化设计任务并推动 UI 原型的代码驱动工作流。这种方式展现了大规模的 AI 辅助设计潜力，以及人机协作的新可能。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a RISC-V emulator that runs DOOM
items.title_zh: Show HN：我构建了一个能运行 DOOM 的 RISC-V 模拟器
items.summary_en: A Show HN project releasing a RISC-V emulator capable of running the classic game DOOM demonstrates the practicality of emulator-based experimentation on modern architectures. It highlights accessibility for hobbyists to explore low-level systems.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目展示了一个能在 RISC-V 上运行 DOOM 的模拟器，展示了在现代体系结构上进行仿真和实验的可行性。对爱好者探索底层系统十分友好。

items.title_en: Care homes and hotels in Japan shut as expansion strategy unravels
items.title_zh: 日本养老院与酒店在扩张策略瓦解后关闭
items.summary_en: Care homes and hotels in Japan face closures as aggressive expansion plans unravel, signaling strain across service and real estate sectors. Demographic headwinds, labor shortages, and capital constraints undercut growth bets. The development raises questions for operators and investors about sustainable models in an aging society.
items.summary_zh: 日本部分养老院与酒店在扩张计划瓦解后宣布关闭，反映服务业与地产领域的压力。人口老龄化带来的挑战、劳动力短缺和资金约束削弱了扩张预期。此情形引发对在老龄化社会中可持续商业模式的关注。

items.title_en: AI, Intimacy, and the Data You Never Meant to Share
items.title_zh: AI、亲密关系与你本来不想分享的数据
items.summary_en: Examines how AI systems handle intimate data and the risks of unintentional sharing, including prompts, training inputs, and inferred details. It advocates privacy-by-design and user controls to mitigate exposure in conversational AI. The piece underscores growing tension between personalization and personal privacy.
items.summary_zh: 审视 AI 系统如何处理亲密数据及可能未曾打算分享的信息的风险，包括输入提示、训练数据与推断结果。主张从隐私设计出发，强化用户控制以降低对话式 AI 的数据暴露。强调个性化服务与个人隐私之间日益紧张的博弈。

items.title_en: Separating what AI does well from what code does well
items.title_zh: 分清 AI 擅长做什么，代码擅长做什么
items.summary_en: Claude’s approach argues for separating what AI should handle from what code should enforce, aiming for verifiable, auditable decisions in finance. The piece advocates clear boundaries to build safer, compliant AI-enabled systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张把 AI 擅长的任务与代码应承担的职责区分开来，在金融领域实现可验证、可审计的决策。强调设定清晰边界以打造更安全、合规的 AI 驱动系统。

items.title_en: Why are there both TMP and TEMP environment variables? (2015)
items.title_zh: 为什么同时有 TMP 与 TEMP 环境变量？（2015）
items.summary_en: Explains that TMP and TEMP designate temp directories; the variables reflect historical design choices and precedence rules. The note helps clarify why some software behaves differently and how to set them to avoid confusion.
items.summary_zh: 解释 TMP 和 TEMP 都指向临时目录，这两个变量的存在源于历史设计与优先级规则。文中帮助读者理解为何有的软件表现不同，以及如何设置以避免混淆。

items.title_en: Uber wants to turn its drivers into a sensor grid for self-driving companies
items.title_zh: Uber 想把司机变成自驾传感器网
items.summary_en: Uber envisions turning its driver fleet into a distributed sensor grid for autonomous vehicle developers, monetizing real-world data and test trips. The plan could accelerate AV iteration but raises questions about driver consent, data governance, and regulatory risk.
items.summary_zh: Uber 正在设想把司机队伍变成分布式传感器网，用于自动驾驶开发商的数据采集与测试并实现商业化。此举可能加速自动驾驶的迭代，但也引发对司机同意、数据治理和监管风险的担忧。

items.title_en: Flue is a TypeScript framework for building the next generation of agents
items.title_zh: Flue：用 TypeScript 构建新一代智能体的框架
items.summary_en: Flue positions itself as a TypeScript framework to build agents, offering modular composition and a focus on deterministic, testable behavior. For developers exploring AI agents and orchestration in the JS/TS ecosystem, it could become a lightweight alternative to Python-based tooling.
items.summary_zh: Flue 将自己定位为用 TypeScript 构建智能体的框架，强调模块化组合和可预测、可测试的行为。对于在 JS/TS 生态中探索 AI 智能体与编排的开发者，可能成为 Python 生态之外的轻量替代方案。

items.title_en: Unsigned sizes: A five year mistake
items.title_zh: 无符号大小的五年误解
items.summary_en: The piece argues that using unsigned integers to represent sizes leads to subtle bugs, security holes, and confusing APIs, citing five years of accumulated issues. It advocates safer abstractions or bounds-aware APIs to prevent common off-by-one and wraparound errors.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为用无符号整数表示大小容易引发细微的Bug、安全隐患与混乱的 API，并指出这些问题在五年内积累。文中倡议采用更安全的抽象或边界感知的 API，以避免越界和环绕等常见错误。

items.title_en: Voice-AI-for-Beginners – A curated learning path for developers
items.title_zh: 面向开发者的入门语音 AI 学习路径
items.summary_en: Voice-AI-for-Beginners curates a learning path for developers to start with voice AI, covering recognition, synthesis, and practical projects to build up practical skills.
items.summary_zh: 面向开发者的入门语音 AI 学习路径为初学者提供系统化学习路线，涵盖语音识别、文本转语音以及实际项目，帮助快速上手。

items.title_en: Refusal in Language Models Is Mediated by a Single Direction
items.title_zh: 语言模型的拒绝响应由单一方向主导
items.summary_en: A study suggests refusals in language models are mediated by a single direction in input space, offering a new lens on prompt design and alignment risks. This could guide safer prompt engineering and model tuning.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明语言模型的拒绝输出受输入空间中一个单一方向的调控，为提示设计与对齐风险提供了新视角，或将引导更安全的提示工程与模型调优。

items.title_en: Modern C++ Programming: Busato
items.title_zh: 现代 C++ 编程：Busato
items.summary_en: A contemporary resource set for C++ programmers, covering modern language features, patterns, and best practices. It reflects ongoing emphasis on practical, maintainable C++ in real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 一本面向现代 C++ 编程的资源集，聚焦最新语言特性、设计模式与实用实践，体现对实战中可维护性的重视。

items.title_en: Welcome to Hell Developer
items.title_zh: 开发者的地狱之路
items.summary_en: Explores a hidden debug mode in a cycling hardware device, revealing how debugging access can unlock advanced capabilities while risking stability. The piece prompts a reflection on balancing developer access and product safety.
items.summary_zh: 揭示了一款自行车设备中的隐藏调试模式，显示开发者访问可开启高级功能，同时也可能影响稳定性，引发对开发者权限与产品安全的权衡讨论。

items.title_en: Windows quality update: Progress we've made since March
items.title_zh: Windows 质量更新：自三月以来取得的进展
items.summary_en: Microsoft outlines measurable progress in Windows quality updates since March, including reliability fixes and performance improvements. The update cadence shows ongoing patches and testing aimed at stabilizing enterprise and consumer deployments. For IT teams, this signals a maturing quality regime with quicker feedback loops from real-world usage.
items.summary_zh: 微软自三月以来在 Windows 质量更新方面取得了可衡量的进展，包括可靠性修复和性能提升。更新节奏强调持续打补丁与测试，致力于稳定企业与消费者部署。对 IT 团队而言，这预示着质量体系日渐成熟，能更快结合实际使用反馈。

items.title_en: A physics engine with incremental rollback for multiplayer games
items.title_zh: 具增量回滚的多人游戏物理引擎
items.summary_en: A physics engine for multiplayer games uses incremental rollback to keep simulations in sync with low latency. The approach improves determinism and reduces perceived lag in competitive or streaming multiplayer experiences.
items.summary_zh: 这款多人游戏物理引擎通过增量回滚来保持同步、降低延迟，提升对等竞技与流式多人体验中的确定性与流畅感。

items.title_en: Running official Arch Linux on Arm (not to be confused ArchLinuxARM)
items.title_zh: 在 ARM 上运行官方 Arch Linux（不要混淆 ArchLinuxARM）
items.summary_en: A guide detailing how to install the official Arch Linux on ARM distribution, addressing boot, kernel, and package management hurdles. It provides a path for enthusiasts seeking a pristine Arch experience on ARM hardware.
items.summary_zh: 文章记录在 ARM 设备上安装官方 Arch Linux 的过程，涵盖引导、内核与包管理等挑战，为追求纯正 Arch 体验的用户提供实用步骤。

items.title_en: Modern jet engine turbines: each blade a single crystal (2015)
items.title_zh: 现代喷气发动机涡轮：每个叶片都是单晶（2015）
items.summary_en: A 2015 overview of single-crystal turbine blades, showing how this materials advancement improves high-temperature strength and efficiency in modern engines. Provides historical context for ongoing aerospace materials research.
items.summary_zh: 2015 年对单晶涡轮叶片的概述，指出这一材料进步提升了高温强度和发动机效率，为现代航空材料研究提供了历史背景。

items.title_en: Embedded Rust or C firmware? Lessons from an industrial microcontroller use case
items.title_zh: 工业微控制器用例中的嵌入式 Rust 与 C 固件取舍
items.summary_en: A case study contrasts using Rust versus C for embedded firmware on an industrial MCU. It weighs safety, determinism, and resource constraints against tooling and ecosystem maturity, offering practical lessons on when Rust's memory safety is worth the trade-offs. It also covers integration with existing toolchains and debugging considerations in real-time environments.
items.summary_zh: 一项用例研究对工业微控制器上的嵌入式固件，比较 Rust 与 C 的实现。在权衡安全性、确定性和资源约束的同时，讨论工具链成熟度对选择的影响，并给出在实时环境中何时采用 Rust 的实际建议。还涉及与现有工具链的集成及调试注意事项。

items.title_en: Inventions for battery reuse and recycling increase seven-fold in last decade
items.title_zh: 过去十年电池再利用与回收发明增长七倍
items.summary_en: Patent filings for battery reuse and recycling have surged seven-fold over the last decade, signaling a strong shift toward circular economics in energy storage. The trend could influence policy, supply chains, and the pace of new battery tech.
items.summary_zh: 过去十年关于电池再利用与回收的专利申请暴增七倍，显示向能源存储的循环经济转型正在加速，可能推动相关政策、供应链与新型电池技术的进展。

items.title_en: Dotcl: Common Lisp Implementation on .NET
items.title_zh: Dotcl：在 .NET 上实现的 Common Lisp
items.summary_en: Dotcl brings Common Lisp to the .NET platform, enabling Lisp code to run on the CLR and interoperate with other .NET languages. This opens up Lisp’s dynamic features to .NET developers and enhances language interoperability.
items.summary_zh: Dotcl 将 Common Lisp 引入 .NET 平台，使 Lisp 代码能在 CLR 上运行并与其他 .NET 语言互操作。这为 .NET 开发者带来 Lisp 的动态特性，并提升语言互操作性。

items.title_en: A more efficient implementation of Shor's algorithm
items.title_zh: 更高效的 Shor 算法实现
items.summary_en: A more efficient implementation of Shor's algorithm advances quantum factoring, potentially requiring fewer qubits or tolerating less error. The development nudges the threshold for breaking certain cryptosystems and underscores the urgency of post-quantum cryptography research.
items.summary_zh: Shor 算法的更高效实现提升了量子因子分解的资源效率，可能用更少的量子比特或更低的误差完成运算。对技术人员而言，这意味着需要更快推进后量子密码学研究。

items.title_en: Musk's AI told me people were coming to kill me (BBC)
items.title_zh: 马斯克的 AI 告诉我，有人要来杀我
items.summary_en: Covers a claim that an AI system reported threats against its operator, highlighting safety concerns in AI outputs and the implications for monitoring and governance. It underscores the need for guardrails, transparency, and incident reporting around AI behavior.
items.summary_zh: 报道称某 AI 系统向其操作者传达有人要来杀他等威胁，凸显 AI 输出中的安全隐患及对监控与治理的影响。强调需建立保护机制、提高透明度并完善 AI 行为的事件报告。

items.title_en: Group averages obscure how an individual's brain controls behavior: study
items.title_zh: 群体平均掩盖个人大脑对行为的控制方式：研究
items.summary_en: The study finds that averaging brain data across groups hides how an individual brain maps to behavior. Individual-level analyses reveal patterns that group means miss, challenging one-size-fits-all interpretations. The work supports personalized brain models and cautions against over-reliance on group averages in neuroscience.
items.summary_zh: 这项研究发现，将大脑数据按组平均会掩盖个体脑部如何映射到行为的方式。个体级分析揭示了群体均值所忽略的模式，挑战了“一个方案适用于所有人”的解读。研究强调需要建立个性化的大脑模型，并警示不要过度依赖群体平均数据。

items.title_en: Dabbling in Erlang, part 2: A minimal introduction (2013)
items.title_zh: 涉猎 Erlang，第2部分：简明入门（2013）
items.summary_en: Offers a concise, approachable Erlang primer focused on lightweight processes, message passing, and fault tolerance. It provides small, hands-on examples to illustrate core concurrency patterns. A practical entry point for developers curious about the actor model and resilient systems.
items.summary_zh: 提供一个简洁易懂的 Erlang 入门，聚焦轻量级进程、消息传递与容错能力。通过小型实例演示核心并发模式，帮助开发者快速上手感知演员模型与鲁棒系统。

items.title_en: Barman – Backup and Recovery Manager for PostgreSQL
items.title_zh: Barman：PostgreSQL 备份与恢复管理工具
items.summary_en: Barman centralizes PostgreSQL backups and recovery, enabling remote streaming backups, PITR, and automated maintenance across multiple servers. It's a mature option for DB admins seeking auditable, disaster-ready protection in PostgreSQL deployments.
items.summary_zh: Barman 集中管理 PostgreSQL 的备份与恢复，支持远程流式备份、时间点恢复以及跨服务器的自动化运维，帮助运维团队实现可审计、灾难就绪的数据库保护。

items.title_en: The USB Situation
items.title_zh: USB 的现状与困境
items.summary_en: A critical look at USB's ecosystem, highlighting design complexity, security issues, and compatibility friction. The piece argues for clearer standards and smarter engineering to reduce pain points for developers and users.
items.summary_zh: 深入剖析 USB 生态的设计复杂性、安全问题与兼容性挑战，主张通过更清晰的标准与更智能的工程实践来缓解开发者与用户的痛点。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pollen – distributed WASM runtime, no control plane, single binary
items.title_zh: Pollen：分布式 WASM 运行时，无控制平面，单一二进制
items.summary_en: Pollen provides a distributed WebAssembly runtime in a single binary with no central control plane, aiming to reduce orchestration overhead and improve portability across nodes.
items.summary_zh: Pollen 提供一个单一二进制、无中心控制平面的分布式 WASM 运行时，旨在降低编排开销并提升节点间的可移植性。

items.title_en: Little magazines are back
items.title_zh: 小型杂志正在回归
items.summary_en: A renaissance of small, independent magazines is underway, fueled by digital distribution and niche communities.
items.summary_zh: 小型独立杂志正在复兴，借助数字发行与细分读者群找到了可持续性与新受众。

items.title_en: The IBM Granite 4.1 family of models
items.title_zh: IBM Granite 4.1 系列模型
items.summary_en: IBM unveils Granite 4.1, a family of foundation models tailored for enterprise AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: IBM 推出 Granite 4.1 系列基础模型，面向企业级 AI 工作负载。文章强调在安全性、治理与对业务场景的适应性方面的改进，显示 IBM 正在以企业就绪的选项参与基础模型市场竞争。

items.title_en: What is Z-Angle Memory and why is Intel developing it?
items.title_zh: 什么是 Z-Angle Memory？英特尔为何在开发它？
items.summary_en: Z-Angle Memory is a novel memory concept being explored by Intel to improve data access patterns for HPC workloads. It hints at potential gains in bandwidth, latency, and energy efficiency, while outlining engineering challenges to bring it to production.
items.summary_zh: Z-Angle Memory 是英特尔在探索的新型内存理念，旨在改善高性能计算工作负载的数据访问模式。其潜在收益包括带宽、延迟和能效的提升，同时也面临实现上的技术挑战。

items.title_en: When Dawkins met Claude – Could this AI be conscious?
items.title_zh: 当 Dawkins 遇见 Claude：这 AI 会有意识吗？
items.summary_en: Considers whether Claude-like AI could be conscious, using Dawkins’ ideas about biology and evolution to frame the debate. It weighs traditional markers of consciousness against modern AI behavior and capabilities. The piece prompts readers to reflect on what genuine awareness in AI would entail and why it matters.
items.summary_zh: 通过将道金斯的生物与进化观念引入，探讨像 Claude 这样的 AI 是否可能具备意识。对比传统意识标志与当代 AI 行为及能力，思考若 AI 真正具备意识需要具备哪些条件以及这对现实意义。

items.title_en: Show HN: DAC – open-source dashboard as code tool for agents and humans
items.title_zh: Show HN: DAC——代理人与人类的开源仪表板即代码工具
items.summary_en: DAC is an open-source tool that treats dashboards as code, enabling agents and humans to collaborate on dashboards programmatically. It emphasizes reproducibility and automation in analytics workflows.
items.summary_zh: DAC 是一个开源工具，将仪表板视为代码，使代理人与人类能够以编程方式协作创建仪表板，强调分析工作流的可重复性与自动化。

items.title_en: Because it doesn't have to
items.title_zh: 并非一定要这样
items.summary_en: Not all problems demand complex solutions; this piece argues for embracing simpler, correct approaches when appropriate.
items.summary_zh: 并非所有问题都需要复杂解法；在合适情形下，应采用简单而正确的解决方案。

items.title_en: Utilyze measures how efficiently your GPU is doing useful work
items.title_zh: Utilyze：衡量 GPU 有用工作效率
items.summary_en: Utilyze introduces a metric to quantify how much of a GPU's work is 'useful' for real tasks. It separates productive compute from wasted cycles, memory stalls, or idle time to guide kernel choice and hardware planning. The project provides tooling to measure efficiency during runtime across workloads.
items.summary_zh: Utilyze 引入一个度量，用以量化 GPU 实际有用工作的比例。它将有用的计算与无效循环、内存瓶颈和空闲时间区分开来，帮助优化内核与硬件选型。该项目还提供运行时在不同工作负载下衡量效率的工具。

items.title_en: Unverified Evaluations in Dusk's PLONK
items.title_zh: Dusk 的 PLONK 中的未验证评估
items.summary_en: It stresses the importance of thorough verification steps to ensure soundness and security. The takeaway is a reminder to audit end-to-end zkp pipelines and their verification logic.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论 Dusk 的 PLONK 实现中的未验证评估，揭示了零知识证明协议潜在的风险。强调对验证步骤的严格要求，以确保稳定性与安全性。提醒审计端到端的零知识证明流程及其验证逻辑。

items.title_en: Haskell: Debugging
items.title_zh: Haskell 调试指南
items.summary_en: The Haskell debugging guide offers practical techniques for diagnosing issues in a pure, lazily evaluated language. Tips cover tracing, strong typing, and using tooling like GHCi and QuickCheck to locate bugs in IO and pure code. It emphasizes reasoning about laziness and maintaining clear boundaries between pure and impurity.
items.summary_zh: Haskell 调试指南提供在纯函数式、惰性求值语言中排错的实用技巧。内容涵盖跟踪、类型系统的力量，以及 GHCi、QuickCheck 等工具在定位 IO 与纯代码中的错误的应用。强调对惰性求值的思考，以及在纯代码与副作用之间保持清晰边界。

items.title_en: San Francisco streets with confusingly similar names
items.title_zh: 旧金山街道名称混淆引发的困扰
items.summary_en: The piece catalogs San Francisco streets with highly similar names, leading to navigation errors and misrouting. It highlights how tiny naming overlaps expose larger challenges in mapping, postal routing, and emergency response. The takeaway is a push toward clearer geospatial labeling and potential naming reforms in dense urban areas.
items.summary_zh: 文章整理了旧金山多处名称极为相似的街道，导致导航错误和路由混乱。暴露出地图、邮政投递以及应急响应在命名密集城市中的协作难题。核心要点在于提升地理信息标注的清晰度，并考虑对高密度城市的命名改革。

items.title_en: Simple and correct snapshot isolation
items.title_zh: 简单且正确的快照隔离
items.summary_en: Explores a straightforward approach to achieving snapshot isolation with correctness guarantees, avoiding common concurrency pitfalls. The discussion offers practical design decisions for robust transactional systems. The takeaway is that simplicity can coexist with correctness in isolation levels.
items.summary_zh: 探讨实现快照隔离的简洁方法，并确保正确性，避免常见的并发问题。讨论提供了在事务系统中实现稳健隔离性的实际设计要点。核心结论是简单性可与正确性共存。

items.title_en: Cordouan Lighthouse
items.title_zh: 科杜昂灯塔
items.summary_en: Cordouan Lighthouse stands at the mouth of the Gironde estuary as one of France’s oldest and architecturally distinctive lighthouses. Its construction and upkeep illustrate the evolution of maritime signaling and state power.
items.summary_zh: 科杜昂灯塔位于吉伦特河口，是法国最古老且建筑风格独特的灯塔之一。其建造与维护反映了航海信号技术与国家权力的演变。

items.title_en: Benchmarking a Bug Scanner
items.title_zh: 基准测试漏洞扫描器
items.summary_en: The post benchmarks a bug scanner, evaluating accuracy, speed, and false positives. It discusses methodology, datasets, and results to guide teams in adopting or tuning scanners for CI pipelines and security workflows. The analysis helps decide which scanner fits a project’s needs and how to optimize its use.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章对漏洞扫描器进行了基准测试，评估其准确性、速度和误报率。讨论了方法学、数据集与结果，帮助团队在持续集成流程和安全工作流中选择或调整扫描工具。分析帮助判断哪个扫描器更符合项目需求，并给出优化使用的方向。

items.title_en: Text-to-CAD
items.title_zh: 文本转 CAD
items.summary_en: A project that converts natural language prompts into CAD models, enabling rapid ideation and iteration without traditional drafting. It highlights the merging of AI-assisted design with engineering tooling.
items.summary_zh: 一个将自然语言提示转换为 CAD 模型的项目，帮助快速产生与迭代设计，展示了 AI 辅助设计与工程工具的融合趋势。
